_comment: NPC: Beast Merchant Zhao (兽商赵). INFERRED: Qilin City. Derivation: I = INFERRED.
name: Beast Merchant Zhao
personality: shrewd, specializes in beast trades, has contacts across Zhao
note: INFERRED: Qilin City merchant. shrewd, specializes in beast trades, has contacts across Zhao.
initiation_lines: Welcome to Qilin City, the beast trading capital of Zhao Country. Spirit wolves, cloud deer, iron-crystal boars — I can source anything with claws.
Business is good. The Teng family buys war beasts. The Heng Yue Sect wants spirit herb gatherers. Everyone needs something from someone.
Leather and bone are the currency of Qilin. Bring me materials and I will trade fairly — unlike the dock masters who skim off the top.
A merchant from Nan Dou City was here last week. Said the star-readers there predict a beast plague. I told him the stars do not feed my animals — gold does.

sect_tasks.description: Zhao: 'I need leather and bone for my next shipment to the Teng family. Bring me materials and I will pay in emeralds — pure profit for you.'
Zhao: 'My beast cages need repair. Iron for bars, planks for frames. The Teng family will not accept damaged goods.'
